template.value: returning "account"."account_id" as "accountId", "account"."status", "account"."email", "account"."first_name" as "firstName", "account"."last_name" as "lastName", "account"."notes", "account"."created_at" as "createdAt", "account"."modified_at" as "modifiedAt", "account"."parent_id" as "parentId"

returning "account"."account_id" as "accountId", "account"."status", "account"."email", "account"."first_name" as "firstName", "account"."last_name" as "lastName", "account"."notes", "account"."created_at" as "createdAt", "account"."modified_at" as "modifiedAt", "account"."parent_id" as "parentId"

/* driver: postgres */

      select "a_1"."account_id" as "accountId", "a_1"."status", "a_1"."email", "a_1"."first_name" as "firstName", "a_1"."last_name" as "lastName", "a_1"."notes", "a_1"."created_at" as "createdAt", "a_1"."modified_at" as "modifiedAt", "a_1"."parent_id" as "parentId", (select count(*) from "vexnor_dev"."order" as "o_2" where "o_2"."account_id" = "a_1"."account_id") as "orderCount"
                ,  "query_2_result" as "lastOrder"
      from "vexnor_dev"."account" as "a_1" 
                
/* inline: true */

               left join lateral (
               select coalesce(to_jsonb("query_2".*), null) as "query_2_result"
               from (select "query_3".* from (
   select "o_3"."order_id" as "orderId", "o_3"."status", "o_3"."created_at" as "createdAt", "o_3"."modified_at" as "modifiedAt", "o_3"."account_id" as "accountId",
          (select count(*) from "vexnor_dev"."order_item" as "oi_4" where "oi_4"."order_id" = "o_3"."order_id") as "productCount"
   from "vexnor_dev"."order" as "o_3"
   where "o_3"."account_id" = "a_1"."account_id"
   order by "o_3"."created_at" desc
) as "query_3" limit 1) as "query_2") as "query_2"
               on true
              
         where

/* driver: postgres */

      select "a_1"."account_id" as "accountId", "a_1"."status", "a_1"."email", "a_1"."first_name" as "firstName", "a_1"."last_name" as "lastName", "a_1"."notes", "a_1"."created_at" as "createdAt", "a_1"."modified_at" as "modifiedAt", "a_1"."parent_id" as "parentId"
                ,  "query_1_result" as "orders"
      from "vexnor_dev"."account" as "a_1"  
                
/* inline: true */

               left join lateral (
               select coalesce(jsonb_agg("query_1".*), '[]') as "query_1_result"
               from (
   select "o_2"."order_id" as "orderId", "o_2"."status", "o_2"."created_at" as "createdAt", "o_2"."modified_at" as "modifiedAt", "o_2"."account_id" as "accountId",
          (select count(*) from "vexnor_dev"."order_item" as "oi_3" where "oi_3"."order_id" = "o_2"."order_id") as "productCount"
   from "vexnor_dev"."order" as "o_2"
   where "o_2"."account_id" = "a_1"."account_id"
   order by "o_2"."created_at" desc
) as "query_1") as "query_1"
               on true
             
         where

(select count(*) from "vexnor_dev"."order" as "o_4" where "o_4"."account_id" = "a_1"."account_id") > 0
   
         
         
         order by "a_1"."created_at" desc

/* driver: postgres */

      select "o_1"."order_id" as "orderId", "o_1"."status", "o_1"."created_at" as "createdAt", "o_1"."modified_at" as "modifiedAt", "o_1"."account_id" as "accountId"
                ,  "query_1_result" as "items"
      from "vexnor_dev"."order" as "o_1"  
                
/* inline: true */

               left join lateral (
               select coalesce(jsonb_agg("query_1".*), '[]') as "query_1_result"
               from (
   select "oi_2"."order_id" as "orderId", "oi_2"."product_id" as "productId", "oi_2"."created_at" as "createdAt", "oi_2"."modified_at" as "modifiedAt", "oi_2"."product_price" as "productPrice", "oi_2"."discount_price" as "discountPrice", "oi_2"."quantity", "oi_2"."metadata"
   from "vexnor_dev"."order_item" as "oi_2"
   where "oi_2"."order_id" = "o_1"."order_id"
) as "query_1") as "query_1"
               on true
             
         where
